title: rubus × assurgens var. pusillus
intro: Rubus × assurgens var. pusillus, also known as dwarf thimbleberry, is a rare and small shrub native to North America, characterized by its unique thimble-shaped fruit. The medicinal properties of Rubus × assurgens var. pusillus include its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
